title: 自制替身『Homemade Stand』
description:
模组内容基于日本漫画家荒木飞吕彦所创作的著名漫画《JoJoの奇妙冒险》所制作
This module is based on the famous manga "JoJo's Wonderful Adventure" by Japanese manga artist Hikaru Araki.
body:
！！！注意，此模组目前为测试版，内容并不多！！！
此模组名为《自制替身》，此模组内容基于日本漫画家荒木飞吕彦所创作的著名漫画《JoJoの奇妙冒险》所制作
模组版本为1.21.1
此模组添加了《JoJoの奇妙冒险》漫画中经典反派“迪奥·布兰度”的替身——『The World』获得方式为在游戏内输入指令：/function stand:theworld
还添加了“迪奥·布兰度”在《JoJoの奇妙冒险：星尘远征军》中所使用的道具——小刀
获得方式为游戏内合成!![铁球]
此模组将持续更新，以后会出更多的替身
!!! Note that this module is currently in beta and doesn't have much content!!!!
This module is based on the famous manga “JoJo's Wonderful Adventure” created by the Japanese manga artist Hikaru Araki. Module version is 1.21.1. This module adds the double of the classic villain of “JoJo's Wonderful Adventure”, “Dio Brando”, and “The World”, which can be obtained by typing the command /function stand: theworld. -The World“ can be obtained by typing the command ”/function stand:theworld“ in the game. It also adds the props used by ”Dio Brando“ in ”JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Stardust Expedition". --This module will continue to be updated and more stand-ins will be released in the future.![小刀]
